name: Cervical Cancer Screening Codes (Pap Test and HPV Test)
description: CPT, HCPCS, and LOINC codes for cervical cancer screening including Pap smears (cytology) and HPV DNA/RNA testing. Used in the cervical cancer screening measure (CCS). Pap test has 3-year lookback; HPV test has 5-year lookback (age 30-64); co-testing (Pap + HPV) has 5-year lookback.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
